goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should 'leave after 08:45'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should leave after 08:45
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on friday
Make sure you get arrival time and price
